text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I think maybe I focused a bit too much on
the fighting...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, I tried a trick my papa taught me to help me
fall asleep...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I can't sleep, I imagine every wrestler
challenging me one by one!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
He told me that imagination would eventually
turn into a dream. But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This one wrestler jumped in unannounced... I almost had them, but... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like El Condor Pasa didn't get enough
sleep.
